/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/pipixia.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipixia.dir/src/cli.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipixia.dir/src/util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipixia.dir/src/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipixia.dir/src/model_preset.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipixia.dir/src/http_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipixia.dir/src/provider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipixia.dir/src/tools.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipixia.dir/src/session_store.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipixia.dir/src/auth.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipixia.dir/src/cron_service.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipixia.dir/src/skills.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipixia.dir/src/agent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipixia.dir/src/gateway.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipixia.dir/src/version.cpp.o -o pipixia  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so
